# node-aabb

[![NPM version](https://img.shields.io/npm/v/node-aabb.svg)](https://npmjs.com/package/node-aabb)

Axis-aligned bounding box math for JavaScript.

## Usage

```js
const { AABB } = require("node-aabb")

const box = new AABB(0, 0, 0, 1, 1, 1)
const expanded = box.clone().expand(1, 0, 1)

console.log(expanded.containsCoords(1.5, 0.5, 1.5))
```

With `vec3`:

```js
const { Vec3 } = require("vec3")
const { AABB } = require("node-aabb")

const hit = new AABB(0, 0, 0, 1, 1, 1).intersectsRay(
  new Vec3(-1, 0.5, 0.5),
  new Vec3(1, 0, 0)
)

console.log(hit)
```

## API

```ts
import { AABB } from "node-aabb"
```

The package exports the `AABB` class as both a named and default export.

## History

This package was split out from [`@nxg-org/mineflayer-util-plugin`](https://github.com/nxg-org/mineflayer-util-plugin).
